stemHtml: You are enroute to an airport when you receive a NOTAM stating that EGNOS would not be available at your estimated time of arrival. What should you do?

options.a: Check RAIM to ensure GNSS availability and continue to LNAV/VNAV minima.
options.b: Use a conventional approach as you can not use GNSS.
options.c: Check RAIM to ensure GNSS availability and continue to LPV minima.
options.d: Check RAIM and continue to LPV minima if LNAV/VNAV is not available.
